input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.1.2
            TITLE: any chassis design that combines the tube frame, monocoque, tubing and/or composite

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.1.2: Any chassis design that combines the Tube Frame, Monocoque, tubing and/or composite
F.5.1.2 Any chassis design that combines the Tube Frame, Monocoque, tubing and/or composite 
types must: 
a. Meet all relevant requirements F.5.1.1 
b. Show Equivalence F.2.3, as applicable  
c. Any connections must meet F.5.4, F.5.5, F.7.8 as applicable, or Equivalent.

final_answer: Any chassis design that combines the Tube Frame, Monocoque, tubing and/or composite types must: a. Meet all relevant requirements F.5.1.1 b. Show Equivalence F.2.3, as applicable c. Any connections must meet F.5.4, F.5.5, F.7.8 as applicable, or Equivalent.
